# KeeRadar Shared Infrastructure (synced copy)

**Do not edit files in this directory directly.**

This is a synced copy of the shared infrastructure maintained in
`KPPasskeyChecker/src/Shared` (the canonical source).

To update: make changes in `KPPasskeyChecker/src/Shared`, then run
`sync-shared.ps1` in this repo to propagate them here.

---

For documentation on the contents and constraints of this shared library,
see `KPPasskeyChecker/src/Shared/README.md`.
